SEARCH
Package com.lattice.edge

Class OverflowPolicy

java.lang.Object
com.lattice.edge.OverflowPolicy
public final class OverflowPolicy extends Object
Immutable policy for writes to a full edge.

Policies are interpreted by the runtime edge writer. Some policies are lossy by design and are reflected in EdgeMetrics and GraphMetrics.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    OverflowPolicy.OverflowKind
    Full-edge behaviors.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static OverflowPolicy
    block()
    Blocks until the edge accepts the item.
    static OverflowPolicy
    blockFor(Duration timeout)
    Blocks for at most the supplied timeout before failing the offer.
    static <T> OverflowPolicy
    coalesceBy(Function<? super T,?> keyExtractor)
    Coalesces full-edge offers by a caller-supplied key.
    Function<Object,?>
    coalescingKey()
    Returns the coalescing key extractor for OverflowPolicy.OverflowKind.COALESCE, or null for other policies.
    static OverflowPolicy
    dropLatest()
    Drops the offered item when the edge is full.
    static OverflowPolicy
    dropNewest()
    Alias for dropLatest().
    static OverflowPolicy
    dropOldest()
    Drops the oldest queued item to make room for the offered item.
    static OverflowPolicy
    failFast()
    Fails the offer immediately when the edge is full.
    OverflowPolicy.OverflowKind
    kind()
    Returns the overflow policy kind.
    String
    redirectTarget()
    Returns the redirect target for OverflowPolicy.OverflowKind.REDIRECT, or null for other policies.
    static OverflowPolicy
    redirectTo(String targetNode)
    Redirects full-edge offers to another graph node.
    Duration
    timeout()
    Returns the timeout for OverflowPolicy.OverflowKind.BLOCK_FOR, or null for policies without a timeout.

  • Method Details

    • block

      public static OverflowPolicy block()
      Blocks until the edge accepts the item.

    • failFast

      public static OverflowPolicy failFast()
      Fails the offer immediately when the edge is full.

    • dropNewest

      public static OverflowPolicy dropNewest()
      Alias for dropLatest().

    • dropLatest

      public static OverflowPolicy dropLatest()
      Drops the offered item when the edge is full.

    • dropOldest

      public static OverflowPolicy dropOldest()
      Drops the oldest queued item to make room for the offered item.

    • coalesceBy

      public static <T> OverflowPolicy coalesceBy(Function<? super T,?> keyExtractor)
      Coalesces full-edge offers by a caller-supplied key.
      Type Parameters:
      T - item type accepted by the edge
      Parameters:
      keyExtractor - extracts the coalescing key from offered items
      Returns:
      overflow policy

    • redirectTo

      public static OverflowPolicy redirectTo(String targetNode)
      Redirects full-edge offers to another graph node.
      Parameters:
      targetNode - target node name
      Returns:
      overflow policy

    • blockFor

      public static OverflowPolicy blockFor(Duration timeout)
      Blocks for at most the supplied timeout before failing the offer.

    • kind

      public OverflowPolicy.OverflowKind kind()
      Returns the overflow policy kind.

    • timeout

      public Duration timeout()
      Returns the timeout for OverflowPolicy.OverflowKind.BLOCK_FOR, or null for policies without a timeout.

    • coalescingKey

      public Function<Object,?> coalescingKey()
      Returns the coalescing key extractor for OverflowPolicy.OverflowKind.COALESCE, or null for other policies.

    • redirectTarget

      public String redirectTarget()
      Returns the redirect target for OverflowPolicy.OverflowKind.REDIRECT, or null for other policies.
